/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/body_controller.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/estimator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/gait_scheduler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/hardware_bridge.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/hexapod-server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/leg_fk.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/leg_ik.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/robot_control.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/safety_supervisor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/src/serialCommsServer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hexapod-server.dir/home/volly/pico/hexapod/hexapod-common/framing.cpp.o" -o hexapod-server  /usr/local/lib/libCppLinuxSerial.a /usr/local/lib/libtoml11.a
